name: fill_and_comm
script:
lemma "A \<and> B \<longrightarrow> B \<and> A"
proof
  assume h: "A \<and> B"
  show "B \<and> A"
    sorry
qed

name: fill_and_elim_left
script:
lemma "A \<and> B \<longrightarrow> A"
proof
  assume h: "A \<and> B"
  show A
    sorry
qed

name: fill_and_elim_right
script:
lemma "A \<and> B \<longrightarrow> B"
proof
  assume h: "A \<and> B"
  show B
    sorry
qed

name: fill_imp_refl
script:
lemma "A \<longrightarrow> A"
proof
  assume a: A
  show A
    sorry
qed

name: fill_double_neg_intro
script:
lemma "A \<longrightarrow> \<not> \<not> A"
proof
  assume a: A
  show "\<not> \<not> A"
    sorry
qed

name: fill_imp_trans
script:
lemma "(A \<longrightarrow> B) \<longrightarrow> (B \<longrightarrow> C) \<longrightarrow> A \<longrightarrow> C"
proof
  assume ab: "A \<longrightarrow> B"
  show "(B \<longrightarrow> C) \<longrightarrow> A \<longrightarrow> C"
  proof
    assume bc: "B \<longrightarrow> C"
    show "A \<longrightarrow> C"
    proof
      assume a: A
      show C
        sorry
    qed
  qed
qed

name: fill_de_morgan
script:
lemma "\<not> A \<and> \<not> B \<longrightarrow> \<not> (A \<or> B)"
proof
  assume h: "\<not> A \<and> \<not> B"
  show "\<not> (A \<or> B)"
    sorry
qed

name: fill_contrapositive
script:
lemma "(A \<longrightarrow> B) \<longrightarrow> \<not> B \<longrightarrow> \<not> A"
proof
  assume ab: "A \<longrightarrow> B"
  show "\<not> B \<longrightarrow> \<not> A"
  proof
    assume nb: "\<not> B"
    show "\<not> A"
      sorry
  qed
qed

name: fill_ex_intro
script:
lemma "P a \<longrightarrow> (\<exists>x. P x)"
proof
  assume h: "P a"
  show "\<exists>x. P x"
    sorry
qed

name: fill_all_elim
script:
lemma "(\<forall>x. P x) \<longrightarrow> P a"
proof
  assume h: "\<forall>x. P x"
  show "P a"
    sorry
qed

name: fill_append_nil_right
script:
lemma "xs @ [] = xs"
  sorry

name: fill_append_nil_left
script:
lemma "[] @ xs = xs"
  sorry

name: fill_append_assoc
script:
lemma "(xs @ ys) @ zs = xs @ (ys @ zs)"
  sorry

name: fill_rev_rev
script:
lemma "rev (rev xs) = xs"
  sorry

name: fill_rev_append
script:
lemma "rev (xs @ ys) = rev ys @ rev xs"
  sorry

name: fill_length_append
script:
lemma "length (xs @ ys) = length xs + length ys"
  sorry

name: fill_length_rev
script:
lemma "length (rev xs) = length xs"
  sorry

name: fill_length_map
script:
lemma "length (map f xs) = length xs"
  sorry

name: fill_map_append
script:
lemma "map f (xs @ ys) = map f xs @ map f ys"
  sorry

name: fill_map_map
script:
lemma "map f (map g xs) = map (f \<circ> g) xs"
  sorry

name: fill_filter_append
script:
lemma "filter P (xs @ ys) = filter P xs @ filter P ys"
  sorry

name: fill_filter_filter
script:
lemma "filter P (filter Q xs) = filter (\<lambda>x. P x \<and> Q x) xs"
  sorry

name: fill_take_zero
script:
lemma "take 0 xs = []"
  sorry

name: fill_drop_zero
script:
lemma "drop 0 xs = xs"
  sorry

name: fill_take_length_append
script:
lemma "take (length xs) (xs @ ys) = xs"
  sorry

name: fill_drop_length_append
script:
lemma "drop (length xs) (xs @ ys) = ys"
  sorry

name: fill_take_all
script:
lemma "take (length xs) xs = xs"
  sorry

name: fill_drop_all
script:
lemma "drop (length xs) xs = []"
  sorry

name: fill_hd_cons
script:
lemma "hd (x # xs) = x"
  sorry

name: fill_tl_cons
script:
lemma "tl (x # xs) = xs"
  sorry

name: fill_set_append
script:
lemma "set (xs @ ys) = set xs \<union> set ys"
  sorry

name: fill_set_rev
script:
lemma "set (rev xs) = set xs"
  sorry

name: fill_set_map
script:
lemma "set (map f xs) = f ` set xs"
  sorry

name: fill_set_filter
script:
lemma "set (filter P xs) = {x \<in> set xs. P x}"
  sorry

name: fill_remdups_set
script:
lemma "set (remdups xs) = set xs"
  sorry

name: fill_remdups_distinct
script:
lemma "distinct (remdups xs)"
  sorry

name: fill_distinct_filter
script:
lemma "distinct xs \<Longrightarrow> distinct (filter P xs)"
  sorry

name: fill_list_all_append
script:
lemma "list_all P (xs @ ys) \<longleftrightarrow> list_all P xs \<and> list_all P ys"
  sorry

name: fill_list_ex_append
script:
lemma "list_ex P (xs @ ys) \<longleftrightarrow> list_ex P xs \<or> list_ex P ys"
  sorry

name: fill_list_all_map
script:
lemma "list_all P (map f xs) \<longleftrightarrow> list_all (P \<circ> f) xs"
  sorry

name: fill_takeWhile_append_dropWhile
script:
lemma "takeWhile P xs @ dropWhile P xs = xs"
  sorry

name: fill_foldr_append
script:
lemma "foldr f (xs @ ys) z = foldr f xs (foldr f ys z)"
  sorry

name: fill_foldl_append
script:
lemma "foldl f z (xs @ ys) = foldl f (foldl f z xs) ys"
  sorry

name: fill_length_concat
script:
lemma "length (concat xss) = sum_list (map length xss)"
  sorry

name: fill_map_concat
script:
lemma "map f (concat xss) = concat (map (map f) xss)"
  sorry

name: fill_nat_add_zero_right
script:
lemma "n + 0 = (n::nat)"
  sorry

name: fill_nat_add_zero_left
script:
lemma "0 + n = (n::nat)"
  sorry

name: fill_nat_add_comm
script:
lemma "m + n = n + (m::nat)"
  sorry

name: fill_nat_add_assoc
script:
lemma "(m + n) + p = m + (n + (p::nat))"
  sorry

name: fill_nat_mul_zero_right
script:
lemma "n * 0 = (0::nat)"
  sorry

name: fill_nat_mul_one_right
script:
lemma "n * 1 = (n::nat)"
  sorry

name: fill_nat_mul_comm
script:
lemma "m * n = n * (m::nat)"
  sorry

name: fill_nat_mul_distrib
script:
lemma "(m + n) * p = m * p + n * (p::nat)"
  sorry

name: fill_nat_pow_succ
script:
lemma "m ^ (n + 1) = m ^ n * (m::nat)"
  sorry

name: fill_nat_pow_add
script:
lemma "(m::nat) ^ (n + p) = m ^ n * m ^ p"
  sorry

name: fill_nat_less_imp_le
script:
lemma "(n::nat) < m \<longrightarrow> n \<le> m"
  sorry

name: fill_nat_le_add_right
script:
lemma "n \<le> n + (m::nat)"
  sorry

name: fill_nat_lt_succ
script:
lemma "n < Suc n"
  sorry

name: fill_max_nat_comm
script:
lemma "max m n = max n (m::nat)"
  sorry

name: fill_min_nat_comm
script:
lemma "min m n = min n (m::nat)"
  sorry

name: fill_isar_rev_snoc
script:
lemma "rev (xs @ [x]) = x # rev xs"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  show ?case
    sorry
next
  case (Cons a as)
  show ?case
    sorry
qed

name: fill_isar_length_replicate
script:
lemma "length (replicate n x) = n"
proof (induction n)
  case 0
  show ?case
    sorry
next
  case (Suc n)
  show ?case
    sorry
qed

name: fill_isar_map_id
script:
lemma "map id xs = xs"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  show ?case
    sorry
next
  case (Cons a as)
  show ?case
    sorry
qed

name: fill_isar_filter_filter
script:
lemma "filter P (filter Q xs) = filter (\<lambda>x. P x \<and> Q x) xs"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  show ?case
    sorry
next
  case (Cons a as)
  show ?case
    sorry
qed

name: fill_isar_foldl_append
script:
lemma "foldl f z (xs @ ys) = foldl f (foldl f z xs) ys"
proof (induction xs arbitrary: z)
  case Nil
  show ?case
    sorry
next
  case (Cons a as)
  show ?case
    sorry
qed

name: fill_isar_concat_map
script:
lemma "map f (concat xss) = concat (map (map f) xss)"
proof (induction xss)
  case Nil
  show ?case
    sorry
next
  case (Cons xs xss)
  show ?case
    sorry
qed

name: fill_isar_nat_mul_distrib
script:
lemma "(m + n) * p = m * p + n * (p::nat)"
proof (induction m)
  case 0
  show ?case
    sorry
next
  case (Suc m)
  show ?case
    sorry
qed

name: fill_isar_distinct_filter
script:
lemma "distinct xs \<Longrightarrow> distinct (filter P xs)"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  show ?case
    sorry
next
  case (Cons a as)
  show ?case
    sorry
qed

name: fill_isar_insort_set
script:
lemma "set (insort x xs) = insert x (set xs)"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  show ?case
    sorry
next
  case (Cons a as)
  show ?case
    sorry
qed

name: fill_isar_card_le_length
script:
lemma "card (set xs) \<le> length xs"
proof (induction xs)
  case Nil
  show ?case
    sorry
next
  case (Cons a as)
  show ?case
    sorry
qed
